Missing implementation diff for root routes `/beads`, `/documents`, `/graph`, `/agent`, and `/personas`; no `src/routes/...` files are shown.
Missing evidence that `src/routes/nodes/[nodeId]/+page.svelte` renders an `<h1>`.
Missing evidence that status, priority, and tier color tokens were centralized in `src/app.css` for `.light` and `.dark`.
Missing `e2e/a11y.spec.ts` run output or check artifact showing 13/13 green.
Missing implementation diff needed to evaluate whether new hard-coded hex colors were avoided.
